[[Dakar (port administrator)|Dakar]] and his fellow ion [[Mining/Legends|miners]] [[Pilot/Legends|piloted]] a number of '''ion mining ships''', which they kept docked at [[Exis Station/Legends|Exis Station]]. Using the [[Starship/Legends|ships]], they harvested [[Plasma/Legends|plasma]] from [[Teedio]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*[[Tales of the Jedi – Redemption 1|''Tales of the Jedi – Redemption'' 1]]
